title: WC26 Match Preview Storyboard
description: One file per fixture. The single source of truth for one preview Short: every text string, stat, color and asset is pre-computed by generate_previews.py so the assembler and the web page (/wc26/<slug>) both render from it without recomputing.

data_complete.description: false while any beat still uses a fallback/placeholder (e.g. teams not drawn, or WC.csv missing). Assembler may still render a draft.

beats.description: Fixed 5-beat skeleton, fixed order. Each beat's TYPE is fixed; its CONTENT is data-driven and may fall back when data is thin. Total target 35-45s.

render.description: Params handed to chart.html for the BML-duel beat clip.

chart_csv.description: Path to the 2-team wide cumulative CSV this preview's duel beat renders.

type.description: hook=flags+teaser; h2h=past WC meetings; bml_duel=chart.html mini-race (the signature beat); players=1 player/side stat; expect=honours + prediction + CTA.

text.description: On-screen strings. Headline always present; sub optional.

stat.description: The data backing this beat. Shape varies by beat type; see sample. May be null if fallback used.

fallback_used.description: true when real data was thin and the beat used a generic framing (e.g. 'first-ever WC meeting').
